name: Okta, Inc.
summary: Okta, Inc. is a company whose securities trade on the Nasdaq Global Select Market. The provided filing excerpt is an Insider Trading Policy (Exhibit 19.1), not a business description, and does not describe the company's products or services in detail. Based solely on this document, Okta issues common stock and other securities and has employees, directors, officers, consultants, and contractors subject to insider trading compliance procedures.
